overall.description: A third-person gameplay clip from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a colorful outfit sitting on a bench in a neon-lit Night City plaza, then running through covered walkways and emerging onto a waterfront promenade. The scene features wet reflective streets, holographic billboards, and a hazy night atmosphere dominated by pink and green neon lighting.

ego character stands up from the bench

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a character sitting on a concrete bench in a futuristic urban plaza at night. A nearby NPC sits beside them while the camera slowly orbits around the seated character. In the background, a massive cylindrical tower displays rotating holographic advertisements, and surrounding buildings glow with green and red neon lighting. The pavement appears wet, reflecting the neon lights, suggesting recent rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with purple neon lighting

events.description: ego begins running forward away from the bench area
enters covered walkway with overhead concrete structure and purple neon lighting

agents.ego_description: running through a covered walkway illuminated by purple neon lights, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt with suspenders walking toward the camera

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure covering the pedestrian path
vertical strips of purple and pink neon lights along the walkway wall
building wall with grid-patterned windows and metallic surfaces
red illuminated vending machine with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: The character stands up and begins running through a covered pedestrian walkway. The environment shifts from the open plaza to a semi-enclosed corridor bathed in purple neon light. The camera follows from behind as the character passes a pedestrian in suspenders and runs alongside building walls with grid-patterned windows. The overhead concrete structure blocks most of the sky, creating a sheltered, tunnel-like atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with city skyline view

events.description: exits covered walkway into open waterfront promenade with view of city skyline
passes illuminated food vendor cart with orange umbrella

agents.ego_description: running along an open promenade with wet pavement, heading toward the city skyline

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing at illuminated cart with orange umbrella and neon lighting

entered.detail: street food cart with orange umbrella and warm yellow neon lighting
tropical palm trees lining the promenade walkway
tall illuminated skyscraper with red lighting visible in the distant skyline
overhead monorail or transit track structure with support pillars

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway onto an open waterfront promenade. The scene opens up to reveal a distant city skyline with a prominent illuminated tower, palm trees lining the wet pavement, and an elevated transit rail structure overhead. The character runs past a food vendor cart with an orange umbrella and neon lighting, continuing along the open walkway with the city lights reflecting off the wet ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, orbiting camera movement within a neon-drenched urban plaza that emphasizes the scale of a futuristic cityscape. It begins with a close focus on a character sitting on a concrete bench beside an NPC, while the camera gradually circles them to reveal the surrounding environment. As the perspective shifts, the view expands to encompass the wet, reflective pavement and the glow of green and red neon lighting from nearby buildings. The scene finally opens up to reveal a massive cylindrical tower in the background, dominated by rotating holographic advertisements that pierce the hazy night air.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered, neon-lit corridor into an expansive waterfront promenade. It begins as the character stands and runs through a covered pedestrian walkway, where the environment shifts into a semi-enclosed tunnel bathed in purple light and lined with grid-patterned windows. As the character passes a pedestrian in suspenders, the camera maintains its pursuit through the concrete structure before the scene suddenly opens up into the night air. The view expands to reveal a distant city skyline with an illuminated tower and palm trees lining the wet pavement, while the character runs past a neon-lit food vendor cart under an orange umbrella. The movement finally carries the character along the open walkway, with the surrounding city lights reflecting vividly off the damp ground beneath an elevated transit rail.
